title: Velerios Customs
description: This modpack is a Server Safe modpack. I am trying my best to keep to the original style of the game but also adding in cool new features to take the game to where I think it should be today.
body:
Not Supported anymore, if you still look forward to having my taste on client mod I will make a new Custom modpack for current version later on in the future when I have more free time!.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The Astrylio Customs Mod Collection series is my custom tuned versions of the games I choose to play. I pick through all the mods I can find to enhance the game the way I think it should be experienced. Some are themed to a certain experience but most are just enhancing the vanilla experience.


This modpack features Performance enchancing mods such as
 - Sodium
 - indium
 - lithium
 - noisium
and many more..

The pack also includes shader support and additionally has distant horizons to make your world look stunning (keep in mind not all shaders support distant horizon as of now)

There are many small mods that each add a unique and amazing addition to the world and it would be too hard to explain every mod in a single description, why not give this modpack a download and see the beauty minecraft can offer you with a single click of a button?
